# OsloVision Python SDK

> Python client library for the [Oslo Vision API](https://oslo.vision) — a platform for creating and managing image datasets for machine learning.

## Installation

```bash
pip install oslovision
```

## Quick Start

```python
from oslovision import OsloVision

api = OsloVision("your_api_token")

# Upload an image
with open("image.jpg", "rb") as f:
    image = api.add_image("project_id", f)

# Create a bounding-box annotation
api.create_annotation("project_id", image["id"], "cat", x0=10, y0=20, width_px=100, height_px=150)

# Download a dataset export
api.download_export("project_id", version=1, output_dir="./data")
```

## API Reference

### OsloVision(token: str, base_url: str = "https://app.oslo.vision/api/v1")

Initialize the client with your API token.

### Methods

- **test_api() -> Dict**: Test API connectivity and token validity.
- **add_image(project_identifier, image, split="train", status="pending") -> Dict**: Upload an image (file object or URL string) to a project.
- **create_annotation(project_identifier, image_identifier, label, x0, y0, width_px, height_px) -> Dict**: Create a bounding-box annotation on an image.
- **download_export(project_identifier, version, output_dir=".") -> str**: Download and unzip a dataset export. Returns the output directory path.

## Links

- [oslo.vision](https://oslo.vision)
- [PyPI: oslovision](https://pypi.org/project/oslovision/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/OsloVision/oslovision-python)
- [Training Notebooks](https://github.com/OsloVision/training-notebooks)
- [README](https://github.com/OsloVision/oslovision-python/blob/main/README.md)
